content.en:
"Is there any hope that the Truncated Boundary will grow into a Heaven-level Domain Boundary?"

Ye Tian was really a little surprised when he got this truth.

He felt that the truncation of the boundary, as part of the Hanhai boundary, would at most restore to the peak of the Hanhai boundary.

And the Hanhai District Boundary was just a yellow-level regional boundary at the beginning!

The so-called yellow-level regional boundary is also the lowest regional boundary, and such a division is the division stipulated by forces such as the Nine-Story Building.

These forces divide the boundaries of each region into Heaven and Earth Xuanhuang, and the division of the Nine-Story Building is also divided according to Heaven and Earth Xuanhuang.

For example, Guquan Xuanlou is one of the Xuanlou, and the Guquan District boundary where it is located is one of the Xuan-level regional boundaries.

And the entire Silent Black Sea has a total of eighteen heaven-level regional boundaries, sixty-six prefecture-level regional boundaries, thousands of Xuan-level regional boundaries, and the others are all yellow-level regional boundaries.

What level a regional boundary is is decided almost at the beginning of its birth, unless the big forces spend a huge amount of money to transform and improve the origin of the regional boundary, it is possible to make the regional boundary promoted.

"Landlord, how can the truncated district boundary be qualified to become a heaven-level regional boundary???

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

Even the Hanhai District Boundary does not have this qualification, how can it be qualified to cut off the District Boundary?

"The reason is to cut off the Black Mountain!" the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor explained, "Since the Great Stone Ancient Nest is at the boundary of the Hanhai Region and covers a Truncated Black Mountain, many Ninefold Origin Ancestors have gone over to check and found the slightest change in the Truncated Black Mountain. In addition, the changes in the truncated area boundary in recent years, so our Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building went to investigate again, and found that there was a little change in the depths of the Truncated Black Mountain, which seemed to be that when the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary rushed to the Truncated District Boundary, it took away some mysterious substances of the Truncated Black Mountain, thus causing the Truncated District Boundary to have the potential to become a heaven-level regional boundary. Of course, at present, it is only potential, and it does not mean that it can really become a heaven-level regional boundary, but it should be easy to become a Xuan-level regional boundary!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

But just from the truncation of Montenegro, some special substances can be produced to make the truncated area boundary have the potential to become a heaven-level regional boundary, so how mysterious is the entire truncation of Montenegro!

"Landlord, what secrets does Black Mountain have?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor shook his head, "I don't know very well, I only know that endless years ago, when the Truncated Black Mountain was just conceived, there was a Ninefold Ancestor who tried to break into the depths of the time and space of the Truncated Black Mountain, trying to understand the secret of the Truncated Black Mountain, and as a result, he fell into the time and space in the depths of the Truncated Black Mountain!"

"What, the Nine Primordial Ancestors have fallen?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Ninefold Origin Ancestor is the top combat power in the Silent Black Sea, even if it is placed in the Primordial Ancient Sea, it is also the top combat power.

Such a strong man actually fell in the process of exploring and cutting off the depths of time and space in Montenegro, and he didn't even escape, it's too terrifying to cut off the depths of Montenegro!

"Didn't the Nine Ancestors try to probe later?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor smiled bitterly and said, "Which Ninefold Origin Ancestor is willing to take risks? Moreover, the materials suitable for the Ninefold Origin Ancestor to refine the clone are almost extinct, even if there is a Ninefold Origin Ancestor refining the clone, they don't want to waste it! Moreover, many Ninefold Origin Ancestors have deduced, and the results show that even if the top Ninefold Origin Ancestor goes to investigate, it is still a life of nineteen deaths! Therefore, since then, there has been no Nine Origin Ancestor to explore the secrets that cut off the depths of Black Mountain's time and space. "

"The top Ninefold Ancestor will die nine times if he goes there!"

Ye Tian really gasped.

From this point of view, if you want to understand the secret of cutting off the depths of Black Mountain's time and space, unless you are beyond the realm of the peak of the Nine Ancestral Ancestors.

But at present, as far as he knew, the Silent Black Sea and the Primordial Ancient Sea, the peak of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor were the highest realms.

"When I become a Ninefold Ancestor in the future, I can go and investigate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, he has a replica body, but he is not afraid of falling.

But now there is no need, after all, he can't even go, even if he can really go there, and lose countless copy bodies, he doesn't want to find out anything.

......

After learning the potential of cutting off the boundary, Ye Tian called his disciple Han Xuan back.

For Han Xuan, there are more opportunities to cut off the boundary in the future.

Moreover, Ye Tian was ready to let Han Xuan enter the soon-to-be-established Truncated Yellow Building.

At present, with his help, Han Xuan is also about to raise his life level to a level of 6 or more, and once his life level reaches 6 or more, he will be eligible to join the Truncation Yellow Building.

After Han Xuan received Ye Tian's order, he quickly returned to the boundary of the truncation area.

Archean Plains boundary.

Han Xuan is back.

"Master!"

Han Xuan was very puzzled why his master asked him to return to the Truncated Area Boundary, although the Truncated Area Boundary had changed slightly recently, and there were many more resources, and there was even hope that it would be restored to the level of the Hanhai District Boundary in the future.

However, it's better for her to stay in the Hanhai District for now!

Ye Tian looked at Han Xuan and said, "Apprentice, the truncation boundary has changed, you can easily surpass the Hanhai region boundary in the future, stay here, you will have more opportunities." In addition, I will help you raise your life level to 6 or above, so that you can also join the Truncated Yellow Building, and the road ahead will be much easier than before!"

"Master, to cut off the boundaries of the district, to establish a truncated Yellow Building?"

Han Xuan was a little surprised.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "The Truncated Boundary has the potential to become a more powerful Boundary in the future, so there will be many opportunities here in the future, so the Nine-Story Building will build a branch here." You stay in the Yellow Building, if there is a chance here, you can get the news faster, and get the opportunity. "

"Master, will you also stay in the Truncated Yellow Building?"

Han Xuan asked.

"Hmm!" Ye Tian said, "I'll leave a clone here!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out a treasure that could improve the level of life, and it happened to be suitable for the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and gave it to Han Xuan.

Han Xuan spent the next few days refining this resource treasure and improving his life level.

After a period of time, Han Xuan's life level was officially raised to 6.2.

At this time, the truncated Yellow Building was successfully built, and the location was in a certain ancient nest in the truncated Black Mountain.

At present, this ancient nest has been renovated by the nine-story building, and it is very hidden, and there are a lot of resources in the ancient nest.

This is the place where the Nine-Story Building is exploring and is very suitable for the construction of the Yellow Mansion Branch, which is even better than the ancient nest occupied by the Terrans!
